sentence_reviews.text: Computability and time, space, sample, and communication complexity describe what can be solved and at what cost.

sentence_reviews.text: Its abstractions require explicit assumptions; a mathematically valid result can still be irrelevant to a mismatched empirical setting. Its direct dependencies include Algorithms & data structures, Discrete mathematics & logic.

sentence_reviews.text: Complexity & computability rests on the formal or computational capabilities supplied by Algorithms & data structures.

sentence_reviews.notes: AIMA directly names algorithms, data structures, pseudocode, and complexity analysis. The exact 'rests on' dependency wording is atlas synthesis, but the dependency is defensible from the inspected evidence.

sentence_reviews.text: Complexity & computability rests on the formal or computational capabilities supplied by Discrete mathematics & logic.

sentence_reviews.notes: AIMA supports mathematics, logic, model checking, sets, and complexity analysis as related foundations. The exact dependency rationale is synthesized rather than directly quoted.

edge_reviews.notes: Complexity analysis is normally applied to algorithms and their resource use, and AIMA places search algorithms/data structures and complexity analysis in the same mathematical/algorithmic background. The source does not state this exact edge, but the required/core direction is defensible.

AIMA supports mathematics, logic, theorem proving, model checking, sets, and complexity analysis as related formal foundations. The exact edge wording is not directly stated, but the required/core dependency is defensible under the atlas convention.
